title: 準2級 模擬テスト9 リスニング第1部 1

title: 準2級 模擬テスト9 読解 1
prompt:
次の英文の内容に関して、質問に対する答えとして最も適切なものを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選びなさい。

Question: Why is Seattle planning to organize more events?
[Mock 9-1]
passage: Recently, public transportation has become very popular in Seattle. Since 1996, many residents gather on weekends. Nancy, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 317 more events related to public transportation.
choices: Because it helps build a strong community.
Because no one joined the events.
Because they want to make money.
explanation: pre2-09-reading-01: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

テーマから外れた無関係な解答
